latestHandover: Session 4 complete. Implemented Group 1 (Runtime Security & PSS) and Group 2 (Vault Hardening) in `receptor-infra`. Enabled Falco, added PSS labels, restricted monitoring egress, and migrated Vault to HA Raft with Longhorn storage. 11 findings updated (15 tasks completed). Next: focus on Session 5 (Loki Archival and GitOps Drift).

sessionHistory.summary: Initial audit research and document production. 21 findings across receptor-infra. Applied DOC-01 fix to receptor-infra docs/security/audit-logging.md.
Round 1 iterative improvements accepted: KYVERNO-01, ARC-01, ETCD-01, MON-04, CERT-01. All updated to open with full task definitions and phased. Total: 26 findings, 39 open tasks.
Implemented KCTL-03, KCTL-05, KCTL-01, and KCTL-02 in `receptor-infra`. Enabled secrets encryption and etcd snapshots cluster-wide via `node-maintenance` DaemonSet. 8 tasks completed.

Implemented Group 1 (Runtime Security & PSS) and Group 2 (Vault Hardening) in `receptor-infra`. Enabled Falco, added PSS labels, restricted monitoring egress, and migrated Vault to HA Raft with Longhorn storage. Created ADR-012 and ADR-013. 15 tasks completed.
